user_system_path: Between rungs. The NEXT_SESSION_HARDENING mission (roadmap #420) shipped as four themed PRs: #426 (dead-code deletion), #428 (typecheck + un-exclude tests/scripts, 120 tsc errors -> 0), #430 (auth PII tracing gated behind FOLDERA_DEBUG_AUTH), #433 (.env.example completeness + dead skip-branch / TODO cleanup). Batch 5 (Supabase unused-index drop) was evaluated and rejected as WRONG PATH — both indexes are intentionally retained FK-support indexes (#434). Owner-gated items remain: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + Slack/CRON env in Vercel Production, Supabase auth toggles (leaked-password/MFA), the paid Tier-1 selection layer, stale-branch pruning. Constraint: NO paid API calls — prove in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: Between rungs — only control-plane + docs may change until the owner names the next seam (which re-scopes this contract).
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/schema/deps changes without an active seam + scoped contract.
acceptance_condition: Control plane is consistent in the between-rungs form (build-order active_issue: none, contract active_issue: none, no active-seam line in ACTIVE_HANDOFF) and gate:continuity passes.
stop_condition: Stop when the control plane is rolled forward to a clean between-rungs state after the hardening mission and the owner has the final scorecard.
next_command: New session: read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md; the owner names the next seam. The repo is hardened (typecheck clean, no dead orphans, no auth PII in prod logs, .env.example complete). The remaining unlock is owner-side: set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in Vercel Production so daily generation produces the artifact the free trigger surfaces.
